name: converter
description: Local-first conversion router for documents, images, audio, video, archives, and office files. Uses host-available local toolchains like FFmpeg, Pandoc, ImageMagick, soffice, and 7z. Privacy and fidelity focused.
author: qclawbot

capabilities.route_diagnosis: Analyzes the safest local conversion path and expected fidelity tradeoffs.
capabilities.local_orchestration: Uses host-available local binaries to perform conversions when supported.
capabilities.batch_processing: Handles multi-file transformation workflows with local toolchains.
capabilities.fallback_planning: Provides honest local fallback routes when required tools are missing.
capabilities.fidelity_warnings: Flags lossy, structural, partial-fidelity, and unsupported conversion paths.
